description: Google Meet in Chrome; the only end signal is the browser tab title leaving the Meet pattern. A tab title flips on any tab switch, not just a real leave, so END5 holds a tab-title-led end for a minutes-long floor (120 s) before the debounce promotes it: a mid-call tab switch that returns reverts instead of chopping the recording, while this genuine sustained leave promotes once the title stays gone past the floor. A browser quit would end promptly via its cross-class workspace signal instead.
